meta.title: Shared Operator (resource contention)
meta.description: Two processors on two independent lines that both require an operator, but there is only ONE operator in the pool. The single operator is the shared bottleneck: it can serve at most 1/process_time items per time unit total, so combined throughput is about half of the dedicated-operator variant. Set operators=[{Op1},{Op2}] (2 operators) to obtain the dedicated variant and roughly double the throughput.

expected.formula: shared: combined_thpt ~ 1/process_time (single operator saturated); dedicated(2 ops): ~ 2/process_time
expected.tolerance: throughput within 8% (small operator-travel overhead lowers it slightly); operator utilization > 0.9
expected.measure: avg operator utilization ~ 1.0; (SinkA+SinkB)/elapsed ~ 0.1 per unit shared vs ~0.2 dedicated
